creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-11-04 15:12:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/files nagiosgrapher.in 
                                 patch-Makefile.in 
                                 patch-configure.ac 
  Log:
  NagiosGrapher is a full-featured RRD based charting software especially
  for Nagios. You can extract perfdata and pluginoutput with preg to define
  datasources and display it with all RRD options. NG is Template based to
  graph thousands of similar charts with one configuration.
  
  WWW: https://www.nagiosforge.org/gf/project/nagiosgrapher/
  
  PR:             ports/139318
  Submitted by:   Cristiano Rolim <cristianorolim at hotmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.200     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/files/nagiosgrapher.in (new)
  1.1       +173 -0    ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/files/patch-Makefile.in (new)
  1.1       +75 -0     ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/files/patch-configure.ac (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +70 -0     ports/net-mgmt/nagiosgrapher/pkg-plist (new)
